build_method: field-index seq-keyed VI_DICT with suffix mirror, embedded BR/comma preflight
notes: EN-asset-is-English case: title still JP, message fields English. Translate title JP→VI Title Case, message EN→VI.
Celeste voice: self-references as em (casual female), calls Commander as anh (casual/friendly).
Commander voice: self-references as tôi/anh, addresses Celeste as em.
Guard Captain voice: formal to Commander (ngài/Chỉ Huy), scolding to Celeste.
強盗犯 (robber boss) voice: casual/rude, self as tao, addresses others as mày.
盗賊団下っ端 (underlings): casual speech.
警備隊長 translated as Đội trưởng Cảnh Vệ.
Celeste proper name kept as Celeste (romanized).
Frontline Base → Căn Cứ Tiền Tuyến throughout.
Seq 68: '...' (EN translation of JP '!!!!') → '!!!!' to reflect JP intent.
All ASCII commas inside Vietnamese text replaced with U+201A ‚.

EN asset
counts preserved exactly (suffix mirror + internal BR insertion).
BOM + CRLF preserved from EN asset.

intentional_localizations.Celeste: EN proper name, kept as Celeste in VI dialogue (Japanese name セレスト romanized).
intentional_localizations.Informant A/情報屋A: Speaker label kept as 情報屋A in field 1, dialogue references use 'Informant A' convention.
intentional_localizations.警備隊長: Localized as Đội trưởng Cảnh Vệ.
intentional_localizations.Seq 68 '...': JP source had '!!!!' (shock/excitement), EN asset had '...' (milder). Used '!!!!' to match JP intent for Celeste's money reaction.
